issues: Product images are missing/placeholder in the 'New Arrivals' section, severely impacting product presentation.
The 'Scroll to explore' text and icon are extremely subtle, making them easy to miss.
Header navigation is very minimal, potentially hindering product discoverability without a prominent search or category links.
strengths: Elegant and cohesive dark color system with a premium gold accent.
Strong visual hierarchy and generous, intentional whitespace.
Sophisticated typography pairing (serif for headings, sans-serif for body) that enhances brand identity.
specific_improvements: Replace all placeholder product images with high-quality, consistent product photography to showcase items effectively.
Increase the contrast and size of the 'Scroll to explore' cue to ensure it's easily noticed by users.
Enhance the header navigation by adding a more prominent search input or dedicated category dropdowns for improved user experience.
